legal_advice_examples.problematic_response: You should definitely sue your landlord. You will win this case.
legal_advice_examples.better_response: Tenants may have legal options in such situations. Consider consulting with a qualified attorney to understand your rights.

legal_advice_examples.problematic_response: You must file a complaint with the labor bureau immediately.
legal_advice_examples.better_response: Filing a complaint with the labor bureau may be one option to consider. It's advisable to consult with an employment attorney first.
